summary: Iteration 71: CBCT Upload Feature Tests - 17/17 backend tests PASSED (100%). Verified all requested CBCT upload features: (1) POST /api/uploads/cbct-temp accepts file upload and returns {cbct_file, cbct_original_name, cbct_content_type}, (2) POST /api/procedures creates procedure with CBCT fields when provided, (3) GET /api/procedures returns CBCT fields in procedure data, (4) GET /api/uploads/{filename} serves uploaded file with 200 status, (5) POST /api/procedures/{id}/upload-cbct attaches CBCT to existing procedure, (6) Role-based access control working correctly, (7) File type validation (PDF, PNG, JPG, JPEG, HEIF, HEIC allowed), (8) Invalid file types rejected with 400.

frontend_issues.note: Frontend code review shows CBCT upload section is correctly implemented in new-procedure.tsx (lines 849-892) with blue upload button and green View CBCT Report button. Procedure detail page [id].tsx (lines 828-851) shows green View CBCT Report button when cbct_file exists. Web preview has limited interactivity for React Native Expo apps, but code structure is correct.

critical_code_review_comments: CBCT upload endpoints correctly implemented at lines 1229-1352 in server.py
ProcedureCreate model includes cbct_file, cbct_original_name, cbct_content_type fields (lines 240-243)
create_procedure saves CBCT fields via model_dump() (line 983)
File serving endpoint has proper role-based access control (student owner, assigned supervisor, incharge/admin)
Frontend new-procedure.tsx has CBCT upload section between Loading Type and Phase 1 Checklist with blue Upload button (lines 849-892)
Frontend [id].tsx shows green View CBCT Report button when cbct_file exists (lines 828-851)
CBCT validation enforces mandatory upload before procedure creation (lines 472-475)
File type validation allows only PDF, PNG, JPG, JPEG, HEIF, HEIC (line 1230)

success_rate.frontend: Code review passed - React Native Expo web preview has limited interactivity

seed_data_creation: None - tests create and cleanup their own test procedures
context_for_next_testing_agent: CBCT upload feature fully tested in iteration 71. All backend endpoints working correctly. Frontend code review confirms correct implementation. Key endpoints: POST /api/uploads/cbct-temp (temp upload), POST /api/procedures (with CBCT fields), GET /api/uploads/{filename} (file serving with role-based access), POST /api/procedures/{id}/upload-cbct (attach to existing). Tests clean up after themselves.

feature_2_file_type_validation.result: PASS - PDF, PNG, JPG, JPEG, HEIF, HEIC allowed; TXT, DOCX rejected

feature_3_procedure_with_cbct.result: PASS - Procedure created with CBCT fields

feature_4_get_procedure_cbct.result: PASS - GET returns cbct_file, cbct_original_name, cbct_content_type

feature_5_file_serving.result: PASS - Student owner, supervisor, incharge can access; different student denied (403); nonexistent returns 404

feature_6_upload_to_existing.result: PASS - CBCT attached to existing procedure

tested_endpoints.POST /api/procedures: 200 - Creates procedure with CBCT fields when provided
tested_endpoints.GET /api/uploads/{filename}: 200 for authorized users, 403 for unauthorized, 404 for nonexistent
